steps.title: Use plural nouns, not possessives
steps.content: The sentence describes placing both hands between the two antennas of a theremin. The nouns need to be ordinary plurals because nothing is being possessed.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary apostrophes
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly uses possessive forms for both hand and antenna. Choice C makes both plural nouns possessive. Choice D makes hands possessive. The grammatically correct phrase uses simple plural forms. The answer is B.
